mnemonics.title: Properties of Special Relations
mnemonics.content: EST for Equivalence Relations: Equivalence = Reflexive + Symmetric + Transitive. RAT for Partial Orders: Partial Order = Reflexive + Antisymmetric + Transitive.

mnemonics.title: Property Definitions
mnemonics.content: Reflexive: Relates to itself. Symmetric: Works both ways. Antisymmetric: If both ways, then same element. Transitive: Chains work.
